title: Balanced Elytra Crafting
description: Craft your own Elytra by first making Left and Right Wings using Dragon Breath, Feathers, String, and Phantom Membranes (recipe twice).
body:
🪽 Balanced Elytra Crafting 🪽
Tired of grinding endlessly for an Elytra? This mod adds a more balanced and rewarding way to craft your own! ⚖️✨

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

**🔧 How it works:**

You can now craft Elytra Wings using rare but obtainable materials from your adventures.
🧪 Elytra Wing Recipe (Left & Right):
To craft one wing, you need:

🐉 1x Dragon Breath

🪶 2x Feathers

🧵 1x String

👻 4x Phantom Membranes

![left](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/67ac2ff91e22aac3b075df959c909c2fe8d872dc.png)

![right](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1f3ea054065b608938f3a7570f06313c1a8e1c9f.png)

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

**🛠️ Final Step:**

Place the Left Wing and Right Wing together in a crafting table to create your very own:
🪽 Elytra

![elytra](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b325b88bbb0b46143ce0225e5d89e5176b59f0cd.png)

**🌍 Balance & Gameplay:**

This system keeps Elytra valuable while giving players an alternative to End City hunting. Perfect for survival worlds where exploration and resource gathering matter!

💡 Fly smarter, not harder.

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

![intelji](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f981cdb0f9bd8d718bf44ee4eb86d402e673891.png)

This mod have been created with IntelliJ

#AD

**Disclaimer about product: NOT AN OFFICIAL MINECRAFT PRODUCT. NOT APPROVED BY OR ASSOCIATED WITH MOJANG OR MICROSOFT**
